building.empty: No buildings found under this client

floor.empty: No floors found under this building

zone.empty: No zones found under this floor

buildingModal.createSubtitle: Add a building under the selected client
buildingModal.createdAnother: Building created! Ready to create another.
buildingModal.perimeterIntro: Define the building's perimeter by specifying the coordinates of each corner. Points will be connected in order: Top Left → Top Right → Bottom Right → Bottom Left → back to Top Left.
buildingModal.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete — has {{count}} floor. Remove it first.
buildingModal.deleteBlocked_plural: Cannot delete — has {{count}} floors. Remove them first.
buildingModal.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete {{name}} and all assets, devices, and users it owns. This action cannot be undone.

floorModal.createSubtitle: Add a floor to the selected building
floorModal.createdAnother: Floor created! Ready to create another.

zoneModal.createSubtitle: Add a zone to the selected floor
zoneModal.createdAnother: Zone created! Ready to create another.

vendorAssignmentHint: Root clients must be assigned to a vendor for access control.

vendorIdentifications.title: Vendor identifications
vendorIdentifications.description: Associate vendors with this owner and specify the owner's vendor-specific ID.
vendorIdentifications.noVendors: No vendors available. Create vendors first to associate them with owners.
vendorIdentifications.allAdded: All available vendors have been added.

companyModal.createSubtitle: Add a new company to the platform
companyModal.selectVendor: Please select a vendor for the root client
companyModal.createdAnother: Company created! Ready to create another.
companyModal.createdWithVendorAnother: {{label}} created and vendor assigned! Ready to create another.
companyModal.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete — has {{count}} child owner. Remove it first.
companyModal.deleteBlocked_other: Cannot delete — has {{count}} child owners. Remove them first.

validation.industryTooLong: Industry must be 100 characters or less
validation.logoTooLong: Logo URL must be 500 characters or less
